channel.title: The Insect Biomechanics Group on Insect Biomechanics Group
channel.description: Recent content in The Insect Biomechanics Group on Insect Biomechanics Group

item.title: Charlotte Andrew preprint
item.description: Charlotte Andrew released a pre print of Regulation of pitcher fluid volume and properties in six ecologically distinct Bornean Nepenthes species on bio archive. Congratulations Charlotte!

item.title: Brunei fieldwork
item.description: Walter, Charlotte, and Viggo return to Brunei for field work.
